rationale: The proposed homestead exemption change under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §21.0486, which governs technology applications teacher certification. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 21.0486. TECHNOLOGY APPLICATIONS CERTIFICATION. A person who holds a technology applications certificate issued under this subchapter may, in addition to teaching technology applications courses as authorized under the certificate, teach courses in:
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict possible.
